issues.current_text: a new collection containing the last `n` elements of this collection, or all elements if `n` exceeds the size
issues.problem: Slightly verbose; could also mention behavior when `n` is non-positive (returns an empty collection) for completeness.
issues.suggestion: a new collection containing the last `n` elements of this collection, or all elements if `n` is greater than the size, or an empty collection if `n` is non-positive

issues.current_text: a new collection containing all elements of this collection except the last `n`, or an empty collection if `n` exceeds the size
issues.problem: Could mention that a non-positive `n` returns the full collection unchanged for symmetry with takeRight.
issues.suggestion: a new collection containing all elements of this collection except the last `n`, or an empty collection if `n` is greater than or equal to the size, or all elements if `n` is non-positive

general_feedback: The two filled-in @return descriptions are accurate, clear, and consistent with the existing @param style. Both correctly describe the primary behavior and the edge case where `n` exceeds the collection size. Only minor suggestions to mention the non-positive `n` edge case for additional completeness.
